affectedComponent: Hermes cron/watchdog script, not ospex protocol repositories
bug: Bash path construction used ${profile-before-claim}, which Bash interprets as ${profile:-before-claim} style parameter expansion and therefore omitted the literal -before-claim suffix when profile was set.
symptom: Cron POSTGAME_ERROR FileNotFoundError for positions-status-stage-maker-a-<timestamp>.json even though status_for_profile wrote positions-status-stage-maker-a-before-claim-<timestamp>.json.
fixApplied: Changed the script to pass "${profile}-before-claim" and read positions-status-${profile}-before-claim-${TS}.json.
impact: The first failed ticks had already reached official-final score/settle work, then crashed before/inside claim planning. After the harness fix, claims completed; one immediate post-claim read observed projection/indexer lag, and the next verification read reached zero active/pending/claimable positions. The cron was removed after manual final verification.
